description: Global toggle flags that modify re-execution and re-entry behaviour after SL/Target hits.

fields.label: No ReExecute If Moved SL to Cost
fields.description: Blocks Re-Execute when leg's SL was previously moved to cost.

fields.label: No Wait & Trade for ReExecute
fields.description: Skips Wait & Trade delay on re-executed legs — enters at immediate market.

fields.label: No Strike Change for ReExecute
fields.description: Forces re-executed legs to keep original strike instead of re-resolving ATM.

fields.label: No ReEntry/ReExecute after Portfolio End Time
fields.description: Blocks all new entries (re-execute and re-entry) after portfolio End Time.

fields.label: No ReEntry If Moved SL to Cost
fields.description: Blocks Re-Entry action when leg's SL was moved to cost. Default ON.
